title: Replace and repair vehicle body panels and fittings
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Replace and repair vehicle body panels and fittings demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare

pcs.text: Work instructions and job specifications are identified and confirmed1.2 Tools and equipment required for the job are selected and inspected for safe operation1.3 Work area is prepared to ensure safety of personnel, workplace and other vehicles1.4 Repair plan is developed and confirmed with appropriate personnel

elements.title: Replace body panels and fittings

pcs.text: Workplace procedures are identified and followed2.2 Replacement information is identified and interpreted from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications2.3 Components are refitted using OEM approved methods, materials and equipment2.4 Sealant is selected and applied according to OEM specifications2.5 Replacement activities are completed within industry timelines and standards
